subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath delivered from the clutches of abasement and degradation! Thy detailed letter was received and, at the time of its reading, brought great joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یامن انقذه الله من مخالب الذل و الهوان نامه مفصل شما رسید حین قرائت بسیار
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
